name: formatCurrency
description: Currency formatting via Intl.NumberFormat. Formats a numeric value as a currency string.

path.description: A JSON pointer path into the data model to resolve the value dynamically.

value.description: The numeric value to format. Can be a literal number or a DynamicNumber referencing a data model path.

locale.description: A BCP 47 language tag (e.g., 'en-US', 'de-DE'). If omitted, the browser's default locale is used.

targetPath.description: Optional data model path to write the formatted result to.
